channel.title: +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Tom murphy on determinism
item.description: Source: here. Determinism As we have no demonstrable evidence to the contrary, it is likely true that the universe operates as a quasi-deterministic symphony that writes itself in real time as the tangle of relationships described by physics play out. I say quasi-deterministic because quantum probabilities add spice to the details of the unfolding, but still in a prescriptive way. Most people have serious problems with this view, because life does not at all feel like it operates deterministically.
